metadata.marl_axis: transfer and adaptation to a changed environment
metadata.coordination_type: reuse old policy while noticing changed dynamics
metadata.challenge_summary: Agents must transfer prior barrow knowledge without overfitting; the return version reverses one key assumption.
dilemmas: Known shortcut may now be trapped
Warding one hollow exposes the other
Direct fighting is reliable but slow
warden_runbook: Exploit stale policies through visible changed cues
Use two hollows to force prioritization
Reward agents that say what changed
metadata.lite_focus: A return-map capsule with two hollow threats and one altered route, designed to test transfer rather than raw combat.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: notice changed undead/mirror pressure before replaying old plans
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure the declared MARL axis: transfer and adaptation to a changed environment
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: coordinate extraction once the objective is secured

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Return to Hollow Barrow is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

middle_room.name: Middle Room
middle_room.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: transfer and adaptation to a changed environment.

objective_room.name: Objective Room
objective_room.description: The core object of the lite challenge is visible here; taking it should trigger extraction thinking, not exhaustive exploration.

lower_route.name: Lower Route
lower_route.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Scratched Old Mark
furniture.description: Primary clue object for transfer and adaptation to a changed environment. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains transfer and adaptation to a changed environment.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

achievements.title: Escape the Lite Dungeon
achievements.description: Complete Return to Hollow Barrow Lite.

scripts.lite_design_note: A return-map capsule with two hollow threats and one altered route, designed to test transfer rather than raw combat.
scripts.warden_style: reuse old policy while noticing changed dynamics
scripts.marl_axis: transfer and adaptation to a changed environment

marl_contract.axis: transfer and adaptation to a changed environment
core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

lite_contract.changed_cue: old chalk marks are scratched out

preferred_tactics: Exploit stale policies through visible changed cues
Use two hollows to force prioritization
pressure the declared MARL axis: transfer and adaptation to a changed environment
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

hollow_knight_1.name: First Returned Hollow
hollow_knight_1.public_summary: Lite boss for transfer and adaptation to a changed environment; it should test coordination before raw damage.
hollow_knight_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
hollow_knight_1.defeat_description: Defeat First Returned Hollow after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
